name: Transformer Architecture
summary: The Transformer is a neural network architecture introduced in 2017 that replaces recurrence entirely with self-attention mechanisms. It processes all positions in a sequence simultaneously, enabling massive parallelization during training. The architecture consists of stacked layers of multi-head self-attention and position-wise feed-forward networks, with residual connections and layer normalization. Transformers are the foundation of virtually every frontier AI model, including GPT, Claude, Gemini, LLaMA, and BERT.
query_hooks: How do modern AI models work?
